# Urgency from trigger event

## When to use

Use when external events create need.

## Why it works

Timing drives action.

## Mechanism

A trigger event turns nice-to-have into now.

## Required inputs

Compliance change, platform change, deadline.

## When not to use

If urgency is fake.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

CTR, conversion velocity.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
